strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms at scale matching Principal-level expectations
Lacks advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field listed as preferred
Career titles top out at Senior/Staff with limited evidence of director-level IC influence or strategic advisory work

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI expertise and recognized AI products
Years of engineering experience across diverse stacks
Cloud platform strategy and executive-level advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 15 years of versatile engineering experience spanning web, embedded, and infrastructure work, with entrepreneurial signals from founding GISCollective and recent involvement in AI-agent tooling. However, the resume shows limited evidence of the recognized AI expertise, large-scale AI product delivery, or director-level strategic advisory experience expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the preferred advanced AI degree is absent.
